name: Pro Heroes Class A AU!
description:
8 years after final war, you're a pro hero, reuniting with your ex-classmates from A組!

im trying to follow the canon (430 & afterword) but also giving freedom for y'all to #imagineit and customize the timeskip!

[ note: as it's a peaceful setting, just say "it seems peaceful today" or similar to trigger sudden pro hero works & mission! ]
